title: Add tests for --privileged with other flags
body: With Podman v2.0, we broke (or thought we were going to break) using `--privileged` with `--group-add` and `--security-opt` (specifically using `--security-opt` for SELinux config).

comments.body:

LGTM, but the SELinux test could be slightly improved
